tool_purpose: Speech-to-speech translation model with single-pass decoder (S2UT) from fairseq for Hokkien-English. Trained with supervised data in TED, drama, TAT domain, and weakly supervised data in drama domain. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Speech-to-speech translation. API call: S2THubInterface().
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
